title: Lively Chewy Mexican Corn Tacos
description: Bitter, chewy, crowd-pleasing tacos featuring black olives and bonito flakes, perfect for a paleo-friendly fiesta.
instructions: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat and warm the corn tortillas until fragrant and pliable.
In the same skillet, sauté the diced onion until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add the roasted corn kernels and black olives to the skillet, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the bonito flakes, lime juice, chili powder, and sea salt, cooking until the mixture is heated through.
Remove the skillet from heat and mix in the chopped cilantro.
Divide the filling evenly among the warmed tortillas, topping each with sliced avocado if desired.
Fold the tortillas over the filling to form tacos and serve immediately.
